column1: The lady ... teaches us German lives next door.
The film ... I saw yesterday was fantastic.
Kate, ... sister I used to share a house with, has gone to work in Australia.
There was me and there was Kate, ... party it was, and then there were two other people.
... much does it cost to go out to eat?
There are no chances that he can get here in an hour, _________?
He never hands in his writing in time, __________?
They have found a place to stay for the night, ___________?
__________ in poor health, she continued to carry out her duties.
___________ his troubles he never gave up hope.
